commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `zod` and `zod/*` to the tsdown always-bundle policy, adds installed-package verifier coverage for bare `zod` imports reachable from `dist/plugin-sdk/zod.js`, updates tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the public package export points to `dist/plugin-sdk/zod.js`, the source subpath re-exports bare `zod`, and the build policy does not currently force zod into the bundle; the PR body also includes before-fix pnpm-global failure evidence.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; this active PR already contains the focused fix and proof, so the remaining action is normal maintainer review, CI/merge handling, and cluster consolidation.
